title: selago elongata
intro: Selago elongata, also known as the Blue Curls plant, is a flowering succulent native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago elongata include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal preparations like tinctures and ointments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
